chapters.title: 写作从读者承诺开始
chapters.thesis: BookForge first fixes the reader promise so later writing has a stable target.

chapters.title: 故事线给素材排序
chapters.thesis: The storyline stage turns source refs into an argument arc and chapter thesis chain.

chapters.title: 章节草稿承接 thesis
chapters.thesis: Materialization drafts chapters by preserving chapter roles, evidence placement, and voice.

chapters.title: 图表承担证据责任
chapters.thesis: Figures and tables carry source boundaries and review criteria, not decoration.

chapters.title: 交付依赖质量门
chapters.thesis: A production-ready claim requires quality gates, exports, and owner receipts.
